title: Fable
description: Fable is an adventurous magic modpack. Explore castles and huge villages with plently of overworld and underground structures to find, play around with magic mods and new weapons or the new animals, mobs, critters. Plently of build decor and cute farming!
body:
![fable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11226ff0f9daec04d77275de0d058afdec6990eb.png)

**Fable** is an _large_ adventurous magic modpack. Explore castles and huge villages with plently of overworld and underground structures to find and magic mods to play with. There are new weapons, armors, animals, mobs and bosses too. And for the cherry ontop, there are many decor and furniture mods, aswell as farming mods.

**JOIN THE DISCORD TO JOIN OUR FABLE MC SERVER!!** OR DISCUSS MODS! [https://discord.gg/tFkhgkA3c4](https://discord.gg/tFkhgkA3c4)

Fable includes (but is not limited to) these mods:

<details>
<summary>World gen</summary>

- Choice theorems overhauled villages
- YUNGs mods
- towns and towers
- adventurez
- explorify
- immersive structures
- ect

</details>

<details>
<summary>Farming</summary>

- farmers delight
- expanded delight
- smarter farmers
- ect
</details>


<details>
<summary>Magic & Tech</summary>

- botania
- wizzards RPG
- runes
- spellbound weapons
- amarite
- spellblades
</details>


<details>
<summary>Decor</summary>

- supplements
- handcrafted
- diagonal fences
- beautify
- convenient decor
- just outdoor stuff
- cluttered

</details>


<details>
<summary>Equiptment</summary>

- immersive armors
- cosmetic armor
- simply hats
- trinkets
- cosmetic slots (elytra)
- hang glider
- more bows
- spellblades

</details>


<details>
<summary>Animals & Mobs</summary>

- friends and foes
- wildlife
- and more!

</details>
